subject: Sociology
title: The Glass Ceiling
description: Learn The Glass Ceiling in one minute.

hook.text: She's qualified, experienced, and passed over again. The promotion went to a less experienced man. She's not surprised.

buildup.text: The glass ceiling is an invisible barrier preventing women and minorities from reaching top organizational positions.

discovery.text: Women hold under 10% of Fortune 500 CEO roles. The numbers are worse for women of color at every executive level.

twist.text: The ceiling isn't one barrier. It's a web of bias in hiring, mentoring, networking, and performance evaluation.

climax.text: Token appointments at the top don't break the pattern. Systemic change requires restructuring how organizations work.

punchline.text: The ceiling is invisible to those who've never hit it.

quiz.question: What is the glass ceiling?
options: An invisible barrier blocking women and minorities from top roles
A physical architectural feature in offices
